description.value: Ley lines, undead, daemons, the lingering pneuma of the recently dead: you feel them the way others feel weather changing.

system.benefits: Sense ley lines and nexuses within 1 mile ([[/check skill=arcane]]). 1 success = general direction and type; 2 successes = exact location and strongest energy types. Within 100 feet of daemons or undead, subtract 1 from Perception die to sense presence. Determine if corpse possessed pneuma with Medicine or [[/check skill=religion]]
